offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 audit reports/month, manual preparation causes delays in compliance reporting. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual preparation of workers’ compensation audit reports is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
Direct message 20-50 insurance brokers with demo video
Participate in forums where brokers share tools and tips
try_it: Let users test report generation on 1-3 sample items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video showing the manual process
Gather 10 brief interviews from target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Implement default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
